mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SEMI_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_PWD FROM SEMI_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT P.PRODUCT_NAME , H.CREATE_DATE , H.CHANGE FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE H JOIN PRODUCT P ON P.PRODUCT_NO = H.PRODUCT_NO WHERE H.USER_ID = #{username} ORDER BY H.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pageInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageInfo.size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT SUM(CHANGE) FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SEMI_USER WHERE STATUS='Y'
